backend/main.mo: Actor implementing user profiles, onboarding state, recommendations stub, and shortlist management with access control checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing expansion of the neighbourhood catalog and listing related files, components, and tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file mapping frontend file paths to brief descriptions of their roles in the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light and dark theme variables and applying global base styles.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes and wraps the app with ThemeProvider and Toaster.
Login/logout button using Internet Identity with React Query cache clearing and error handling.
frontend/src/components/discover/Discove: Empty‑state card shown when all neighbourhoods are swiped, offering reset and preference adjustment actions.
frontend/src/components/discover/Neighbo: Displays a neighbourhood’s image, name, commute note, rent range, description, and tags within a styled card.
frontend/src/components/discover/SwipeDe: Swipeable deck handling drag gestures and like/dislike actions for neighbourhood cards.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Sticky top header showing the VibeLoc logo and link to the home page.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Top-level layout combining header, routed content area, and bottom navigation.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Renders a fixed bottom navigation bar with links and active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Displays onboarding intro text and a PreferencesEditor that submits renter preferences.
frontend/src/components/profile/Preferen: Form for editing renter preferences including budget, commute, lifestyle tags, and more, then saving via onSave.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: Modal dialog for entering and saving a user's name during initial profile setup.
frontend/src/components/shortlist/Shortl: Displays saved neighbourhoods with images, tags, details, and remove actions or an empty-state message.
frontend/src/data/neighbourhoodCatalog.t: Exports a static list of Nairobi neighbourhood objects with details, tags, and images.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user’s identity and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity login, logout, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/usePreferences.ts: Fetches, saves, and tracks onboarding status for renter preferences using a storage service and React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Hooks for fetching and saving the caller’s user profile through the backend actor with React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useShortlist.ts: Defines hooks for managing shortlist and swipe data using React Query and local/remote storage.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and custom light/dark theme CSS variables with layout safeguards.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/DiscoverPage.tsx: Displays swipe-based neighbourhood discovery using preferences, shortlist actions, and recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Shows onboarding form, saves renter preferences, and redirects to home after completion.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePreferencesPag: Shows user profile, allows authentication, and enables editing and saving of renter preferences.
frontend/src/pages/ShortlistPage.tsx: Displays the user's saved neighbourhood shortlist with removal functionality.
frontend/src/services/preferencesStorage: Manages renter preferences and onboarding state using localStorage with optional backend sync and migration.
frontend/src/services/recommendations.ts: Scores and ranks neighbourhoods based on preferences and returns filtered recommendations.
frontend/src/services/swipeStorage.ts: Stores liked and disliked neighbourhood IDs locally with optional backend synchronization.
frontend/src/types/preferences.ts: Defines renter preference structures and onboarding state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL and hash parameters, persist them in sessionStorage, and clear them from the URL or storage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, container settings, animations, and plugins like typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata including current features, requests, architecture notes, and overall project state for VibeLoc.
